title: A German Man Spent 6 Months Building a LEGO Bratwurst
script: Tommy Schmidt built WHAT? A German man spent 6 months assembling 65,000 LEGO bricks into the shape of a bratwurst sausage — and broke a Guinness World Record for it. The bratwurst is 6 feet and 6.7 inches long. It includes the bun. And the mustard. All LEGO. Schmidt is from Thuringia, Germany, where the bratwurst is not just a food — it is an identity. Die Thüringer, a local sausage company, commissioned the whole thing. The finished model is now on display at their headquarters. A 1-foot LEGO sausage would be impressive. This is 6 and a half feet. The Guinness people showed up. Certified it. The record: largest LEGO brick sausage. That's a real category now. So what's the most absurd thing YOU would build 65,000 LEGOs into?
